curation_notes: The vulnerability is in actix-codec's Framed struct which had a blanket `impl Unpin for Framed<T, U>` that was unsound. The patch replaced this with pin_project and changed methods to take Pin<&mut Self>. While 6 non-config source files were changed (noisy), the actual vulnerability is localized to actix-codec/src/framed.rs where Pin::new_unchecked was used in next_item, flush, and close methods. The other file changes (actix-ioframe, actix-utils, actix-rt) are cascading API adaptations. Locations derived from the patch diff, focusing on the functions containing the unsafe Pin::new_unchecked calls.
